The Second Census of Israel


(Numbers 1:1–4)

NoteTake a census of the men is implied but not included in the Hebrew; see verse 2.

The Tribe of Reuben

The Tribe of Simeon

NoteNemuel is another name for Jemuel; see Genesis 46:10.
NoteZerah is a variant of Zohar; see Genesis 46:10 and Exodus 6:15.

NoteSP and Syriac Arodi; see Genesis 46:16.

The Tribe of Judah

The Tribe of Issachar

NoteSP, LXX, Vulgate, and Syriac the Puite clan from Puah; see 1 Chronicles 7:1.
NoteJashub is a variant of Job; see Genesis 46:13.

The Tribe of Zebulun

The Tribe of Manasseh

NoteIezer is a variant of Abiezer; see Joshua 17:2.

The Tribe of Benjamin

NoteA few MT manuscripts, SP, Vulgate, and Syriac (see also LXX); most MT manuscripts Shephupham
NoteSP and Vulgate (see also LXX); MT does not include from Ard.
